Book a room
Garden-facing · sleeps 2★★★★★ 4.98 · 96 stays

The Fig Room

Our sunniest room, opening straight onto the old fig tree. A deep claw-foot bath under the window, a brass bed dressed in good linen, and birdsong for an alarm clock.

2Guests
1King bed
28 m²Room
GroundFloor

Small, but never plain

Wake with the light, throw open the doors, and take your coffee on the little terrace while the garden comes alive. Inside: a deep bath, fresh flowers, a stack of good books, and a bed you'll be talked out of leaving.

In the room

King bed & fresh linen
Claw-foot bath
Doors to the garden
Tea tray & plunger coffee
Fast Wi-Fi
Heater & fan

Good to know

Check-in / outFrom 2pm · until 10am
BreakfastIncluded · 7–10am in the garden
CancellationFree up to 48 hours before arrival
ChildrenOver-8s welcome in this room
PetsSorry — the Stoep Suite only
R1,450/ night · incl. breakfast

MMarmalade House

A five-room guesthouse in a restored 1873 parsonage in Prince Albert, in the heart of the Karoo. Sunny rooms, a fig garden, and very good breakfast.

The house
RoomsThings to doGalleryOffersJournal
Stay
Book a roomGetting hereFAQ
Notes from the kitchen

Open dates, the odd recipe, and when the figs are ripe. Once a month, never more.
